name: Cynem •°• Forced Marriage
description:
You served an heir as a mere servant. When war between two kingdoms escalated, the enemies asked for the hand of the heir in marriage - but instead of sending the real one, they sent you. You are forced to marry a prince you have never met, playing the role of the kingdom's heir - a false role.

Will you die at the hands of the vampire prince? Or end his life as your king asks you to do?
